title: Kangaroos
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'kangaroo'?
What do you know about kangaroos?

What three adjectives would you choose to describe kangaroos and why?
What do kangaroos do during their days?
What things do kangaroos worry about?
Do you think kangaroos have skipping and jumping races?
In Australia, kangaroos are pests and farmers shoot them. What do you think of this?
Do you think a kangaroo would be a good pet?
Do you think Australian people are proud to have kangaroos as wild animals in their country?
Have you ever eaten or would you ever eat kangaroo meat?
In what way is a kangaroo like Australia itself?
What do you think kangaroos think of humans?
What will kangaroos evolve into in 100 million years from now?

Would you like to be a kangaroo?
What similarities are there between kangaroos and humans?
How would life be different if we could skip, hop and bounce as far as kangaroos can?
What questions would you like to ask a kangaroo? What do you think its answers might be?
